description: CHEXA8 cantilever modal: 5x2x2 mesh, first bending degenerate pair ~8.15 Hz (Euler-Bernoulli)

checks.comment: Mode 1: first bending (Y-plane). Analytical f1 = 8.15 Hz. FE on 5-element mesh: 8.19 Hz (<1% error).
Mode 2: degenerate first bending (Z-plane). Same frequency as mode 1 by symmetry.
Mode 3: second bending or torsional mode — must be substantially higher than mode 2.
